description.value: Price 12,150 gp; Slot none; CL 8th; Weight 4 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration and transmutation DESCRIPTION The sturdy, well-polished oaken shaft and the sharp blade attached to its tip allow this magical staff to be used as a masterwork shovel when not employed in spellcasting. Expeditious excavation (1 charge) Create pit (2 charges) Spiked pit (5 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,100 gp; Feats Craft Staff; Spells expeditious excavation, create pit, spiked pit
